menu.title: Menu
menu.asReadyDesc: Each dish arrives as soon as it's ready.
menu.togetherDesc: Starters and drinks come out as they're ready; mains all come out together.
menu.prepayHint: Your order goes to the kitchen as soon as we confirm payment.
menu.addMoreHint: You can add more dishes during the meal.
menu.liveStatusHint: From there you can track it live and pay.
menu.nameSubtitle: This lets your friends see what you ordered and what they ordered.
menu.namePrivacy: Only shown to people at your table. We don't create an account.
menu.etaClosedShort: We're closed for now. Come back during the next service.
menu.etaSaturatedInfo: Kitchen at capacity{cap}. We can't take more orders right now.
menu.etaNormal: Based on the orders currently in the kitchen.
menu.pickupNamePlaceholder: So we can call you when it's ready
menu.demoHint: Demo mode. Enable payments to use Apple Pay.
menu.paymentApprovalHint: Your order enters the kitchen only once payment is approved.
menu.errNeedName: We need your name to call you.
menu.errNeedPhone: Enter your mobile number so we can let you know when it's ready.
menu.errApplePayInactive: Apple Pay isn't enabled for this restaurant yet.
menu.errSaturated: Kitchen at capacity (ETA {eta} min, cap {max} min). Try again in a few minutes.
menu.errClosed: We're closed for now. Come back during the next service.
menu.errDeclined: The payment was declined by the bank.
menu.sendError: We couldn't send the order. Check your connection.

landing.devTableHint: In real life this step doesn't exist: your table has a QR that takes you straight to the menu.

order.cancelledTitle: {count, plural, one {One dish in your order was cancelled} other {# dishes in your order were cancelled}}
order.cancelledBody: The server will come by your table to let you know. You won't be charged for what was cancelled.
order.receiptHint: Email yourself the receipt or request an electronic invoice.
order.toastReadyHint: It's on its way to your table.
order.etaHeadlineFew: Your order is coming out in a few minutes
order.etaHeadlineMin: Your order is coming out in ~{min} min
order.etaSubDefault: It may change if the kitchen speeds up or gets busy.
order.calledLessMin: Called less than a minute ago
order.errCancelTaken: The kitchen already took it. It can't be cancelled.

pay.declinedBody: Try another method below, or ask the server to run the card again.
pay.howToPay: How would you like to pay?
pay.noGuestsHint: Nobody left their name on the dishes — use Split evenly.
pay.demoHintOp: Demo mode. In production you'll charge with a real card reader (enable payments for the restaurant).
pay.demoHintDiner: Demo mode. In production you'll only see Apple Pay (Safari), card reader and cash (enable payments for the restaurant).
pay.errDeclined: Payment declined. Try another card or method.
pay.errPushTerminal: We couldn't send the charge to the card reader.
pay.cashQuestion: How much will you pay with?
pay.cashSubtitle: Optional. This way the server arrives with the right change.
pay.cashFootnote: If you end up paying with a different bill, tell the server when they arrive.
pay.pseIntro: Choose your bank and we'll take you straight to its gateway to authorize the transfer.
pay.pseFootnote: Secure payment via PSE. We'll open your bank's page to authorize.
pay.errBankList: We couldn't load the bank list.
pay.errTokenizePse: We couldn't process the payment. Try again.
pay.errNoTokenPse: We couldn't process the payment. Try another bank or method.
pay.cardNamePlaceholder: As it appears on the card
pay.errCardName: Enter the name as it appears on the card.
pay.errCardEmail: Invalid email. We need it for the receipt.
pay.errNoTokenCard: We couldn't process the payment. Try again.
pay.errTokenizeCard: We couldn't process the card. Try again.
pay.opCashSubtitle: Note how much the customer handed you. If they tell you to keep the change (all or part), choose what to do with it below.
pay.changeQuestion: What do they do with the {amount} change?
pay.mustPayAtLeast: The customer must hand you at least {amount}.
pay.changeTooHigh: Change can't be more than the amount received.
pay.changeExceeds: The change is {amount} more than it should be. The customer owes you that difference.

done.showCashier: Show it to the cashier when they call you.
done.preparingHint: We'll let you know here when it's ready.
done.keepPayingHint: Someone else at the table can keep paying. This screen updates on its own.
done.invGeneratedBody: It was sent to {email}. If you can't find it, check your spam folder or let the restaurant know.
done.invPendingBody: The restaurant issues it manually from their invoicing software and sends it to {email}.
done.invReceiptIntro: A simple receipt only asks for your email. If you need an invoice under a company name or ID, request it separately.
done.invToName: Electronic invoice under my name or company
done.invSentBody: We sent it to {email}. If it doesn't arrive in a few minutes check your spam folder.
done.invSimpleIntro: We only need your email. We'll send you the receipt with all the restaurant's details and the dishes you ordered.
done.invDoneBody: The restaurant will receive your request and issue the invoice from their system. It'll reach {email} within the next few hours.
done.invSavedHint: Only on this device. If you clear your browser data they're lost.
done.invAddressHint: Search and select your address — city and state fill in automatically.
done.invPrivacy: Your details are only shared with the restaurant to issue your invoice.
done.invErrAlreadyGenerated: An invoice was already generated for this order. Contact the restaurant for corrections.
done.invErrNotPaid: The order isn't marked as paid yet.
done.invErrInvalid: Check the details: something is incomplete.

wait.cashApprovedBody: Thanks for visiting. We hope to see you soon.
wait.cashCancelledBody: Your cash payment request was cancelled. You can try again.
wait.cashWaitTitle: The server is coming to charge you
wait.cashWaitBody: We've notified your server. Have {amount} ready and wait a moment at your table.
wait.cashWaitHint: When the server confirms the payment, this screen updates on its own.
wait.terminalApprovedBody: Thanks for your purchase. Moving on to the final confirmation.
wait.terminalDeclinedBody: We're taking you back to checkout to pick another method…
wait.terminalWaitTitle: The server is coming with the card reader
wait.terminalWaitBody: We'll charge you {amount} on the terminal. Just tap your card when it arrives.
wait.terminalWaitHint: This screen updates on its own when the card reader confirms.
wait.tdsConfirming: We're confirming with your bank. Don't close this window.
wait.tdsErrNoAmount: We couldn't recover the payment amount. Try again from checkout.
wait.tdsErrCharge: We couldn't complete the charge. Try again.
wait.applePayError: We couldn't complete the Apple Pay payment.
wait.pseDeclinedBankBody: Your bank declined the transfer. You can try another method or retry PSE.
wait.pseDeclinedBody: The payment didn't go through. Try another method.
wait.pseProcessingBody: We're confirming the result of your transfer with your bank. It may take a few seconds.

pickup.unavailableBody: This restaurant hasn't enabled pickup ordering yet.
pickup.noNextOpening: No upcoming opening scheduled. Come back later.
pickup.showCode: Show the code to the cashier.
pickup.notifyHint: We'll let you know on this screen when it's ready.

reservar.closedBody: {name} is not taking online reservations right now.
reservar.detailsSent: We sent the details to {email}. Keep this code in case you need to cancel.
reservar.depositExplain: This table requires a {amount} deposit to confirm. It's credited to your bill when you arrive.
reservar.depositTimerNote: You have a few minutes to complete payment before the table is released. If you don't show up, the deposit isn't refunded.
reservar.title: Reserve your table
reservar.noSlots: No times available for this date. Try another day.
reservar.pickTableMap: Pick your table on the map
reservar.depositInfo: Requires a {amount} deposit to hold — credited to your bill on arrival (non-refundable if you don't show up).
reservar.notesPlaceholder: Anything we should know (optional): birthday, allergies, table by the window…
reservar.howPayDeposit: How would you like to pay the deposit?
reservar.cardNamePlaceholder: As it appears on the card
reservar.cardSecureNote: Secure payment. Your card details aren't stored on MESAPAY.
reservar.errCardName: Enter the name as it appears on the card.
reservar.errProcessCard: We couldn't process the payment. Try again.
reservar.appleUnavailable: Apple Pay isn't available for this restaurant.
reservar.errDepositApple: We couldn't charge the deposit with Apple Pay.
reservar.pseSecureNote: We'll take you to your bank to authorize the transfer securely.
reservar.errPseRetry: We couldn't start PSE. Try again.
reservar.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel your reservation?
reservar.errCancel: We couldn’t cancel. Try again or call the restaurant.
reservar.notActive: This reservation is no longer active.
reservar.contactRestaurant: For changes, contact the restaurant directly.
reservar.depositReceivedWithAmount: We received your {amount} deposit. It’s credited to your bill when you arrive.
reservar.depositReceivedNoAmount: We received your deposit. It’s credited to your bill when you arrive.
reservar.depositDeclinedBody: Your bank didn’t confirm the transfer. You can try the reservation again.
reservar.processingBody: We’re confirming your transfer with the bank. This can take a few seconds.

emailReservation.statusRequested: We got your request. The restaurant will confirm it soon and we’ll let you know.
emailReservation.depositNote: Your {amount} deposit is credited to your bill when you arrive.
emailReservation.footerNote: If you can’t make it, cancel ahead of time to free up the table.

emailWelcome.subject: Welcome to MESAPAY
emailWelcome.title: Welcome to MESAPAY
emailWelcome.intro: Thanks for creating your account. You can now order and pay from the table at any MESAPAY restaurant — no apps, no lines.
emailWelcome.benefit2: Pay faster without re-entering your details.
emailWelcome.ctaText: Whenever you want to check your orders, go to {url}

emailInvoice.subject: Your receipt from {brand} — {number}
emailInvoice.emailIntro: We got your payment — here’s your receipt. If you need to print it in receipt format, open the button at the end of the email.
emailInvoice.printLead: Need to print it? Open the receipt in your browser to send it to your thermal or paper printer.
emailInvoice.printText: To print your receipt in POS format, open it in your browser:
emailInvoice.footerHelp: If you have questions about your bill, contact {brand} directly.
emailInvoice.sentBy: Sent by MESAPAY · Made in Colombia

operator.suspendedBody: Access to {name} is paused. Contact MESAPAY to reactivate it.
operator.membershipOverdue: Subscription overdue. Settle the payment to avoid losing access.

kitchen.cancelPresetTitleUnavailable: {label} (also removes the dish from the menu)
kitchen.cancelPlaceholder: E.g. customer changed their mind, ingredient ran out…
kitchen.cancelMarkUnavailable: Also remove this dish from the menu until it's available again

serve.allDeliveredBody: When the kitchen marks something ready, it'll show up here.
serve.title: Floor
serve.summaryTerminals: {count, plural, one {# card terminal} other {# card terminals}}
serve.summaryCash: {count, plural, one {# cash charge} other {# cash charges}}
serve.summaryReady: {count, plural, one {# dish ready} other {# dishes ready}}
serve.cancelledTellCustomer: Go to the table and let the customer know.
serve.terminalSwipeExternal: Swipe the card on your terminal and report the result.
serve.terminalBringDevice: Bring the card terminal to the table and press "Charge".
serve.terminalNoDevice: No active card terminal registered. Ask the admin to register one at /admin.
serve.terminalSendError: We couldn't send to the card terminal.
serve.cashTipExplainer: The tip is saved in the payment for the shift close and reports. It has nothing to do with Kushki.
serve.waitingKitchen: Waiting on kitchen · {count, plural, one {# main in progress} other {# mains in progress}}

opOrders.title: Orders
opOrders.summary: {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} · {paidCount, plural, one {# paid} other {# paid}} · {amount}

opReservas.title: Reservations
opReservas.disabledBody: The reservations module is disabled. Enable it in <link>Settings → Reservations</link>.
opReservas.subtitle: Upcoming reservations and today's. Confirm, mark arrival or no-show.
opReservas.depositApplied: Deposit credited to the table's bill.

opTables.autoRefreshNote: The detail refreshes automatically every 15 seconds.
opTables.confirmCancelOrder: Cancel the entire bill? This only works if the kitchen hasn't started yet. If something has already been cooked, cancel/comp dish by dish with a reason.
opTables.cancelOrderKitchenStarted: The kitchen already started a dish. Cancel dish by dish.
opTables.compItemFailed: We couldn't comp the dish. Try again.
opTables.cancelItemFailed: We couldn't cancel the dish. Try again.
opTables.moveHint: Only available tables are listed. If the destination table has an open bill, close it before moving.
opTables.compSheetSubtitle: The dish comes off the subtotal but stays recorded as delivered. It appears in the comped-items report with the reason.
opTables.cancelSheetSubtitle: It leaves the order, the kitchen board, and the subtotal. This action can't be undone — if it was a mistake, it'll have to be reordered.
opTables.newTableInvalidNumber: The number must be a positive integer.
opTables.confirmCancelOrderSimple: Cancel this order? It can't be reverted.
opTables.printIntro: 30×30mm cards on an A4 sheet — up to 45 per sheet. Flush cards with a shared border: a single cut per line.
opTables.shareLinksHint: Same link encoded in each table's QR. Handy if you want to send it by chat or paste it elsewhere.

opSettings.landingSubtitle: Enable payments, set up card readers, and review your restaurant's information.
opSettings.cardIdentitySubtitle: Logo, legal name, tax ID, DIAN resolution
opSettings.cardUsersSubtitle: Waiters, kitchen, bar, card reader, and operators
opSettings.cardPaymentsSubtitle: Onboarding, bank details, and card readers
opSettings.cardTagsSubtitle: House special, Favorite, Vegetarian… or whatever you define
opSettings.cardDevicesSubtitle: Assign each Smart POS to the waiter who carries it
opSettings.cardPoliciesSubtitle: Shared or per waiter. Single venue shift or per waiter.
opSettings.cardMeserosSubtitle: Assign each waiter their section of the floor
opSettings.cardStationsSubtitle: Where tickets go: kitchen, bar, or fridge
opSettings.cardReservasSubtitle: Take table reservations from a link. Time slots, duration, and confirmation.
opSettings.cardMesasSubtitle: How many fit and the minimum spend per table. Used when booking.
opSettings.cardSalonSubtitle: Arrange your tables as they are in the venue. Guests see it when booking.
opSettings.badgeMeserosSeeAll: {count, plural, one {# waiter sees all} other {# waiters see all}}
opSettings.badgeStationsRouted: {count, plural, one {# category routed} other {# categories routed}}
opSettings.badgeReservasActiveUpcoming: Active · {count, plural, one {# upcoming} other {# upcoming}}
opSettings.tagsIntro: Mark your dishes with tags like “House special” or “Spicy”. They show up as chips next to the name for both guests and the kitchen.
opSettings.tagsEmptyRows: No tags yet. Add the first one below.
opSettings.tagsInvalidSlug: "{slug}" is not a valid slug. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
opSettings.tagsHelp: The display name is what the guest sees (“Spicy”). The slug is the internal identifier stored on each dish — it's auto-filled from the name but you can edit it. If you rename the slug of a tag that's already assigned, the dishes that had it stop showing it.
opSettings.meserosIntro: Assign each waiter the tables they serve. They'll only see the marked ones in Floor, Charges, and Tables. If none are marked, the waiter sees all (useful for shifts with no zone split).
opSettings.meserosEmptyNoMeseros: You don't have any waiters yet. Ask support to create them from the admin with the Waiter role.
opSettings.meserosNoTablesPrefix: First create the restaurant's tables in
opSettings.mesasIntroPart1: Capacity, minimum spend, and deposit for each table. Capacity is used to show the right tables when booking; the minimum spend is shown to the guest. The
opSettings.mesasIntroPart2: is charged online when booking and applied to the bill on arrival (non-refundable if they don't show up). Leave it blank for tables without a deposit.
opSettings.mesasIntroEnableSuffix: so these values are used in the booking flow.
opSettings.mesasEmptyPrefix: No tables yet. Create tables from
opSettings.datafonosIntro: Assign each card reader to the waiter who carries it. When that waiter charges a bill from their session, the system sends the amount straight to THEIR card reader without going through Floor.
opSettings.datafonosEmpty: No card readers linked to the business yet. They'll appear here once paired with Kushki (or created in mock mode from the admin).
opSettings.datafonosAssignedHint: When {name} charges with a card reader, the charge goes straight to this device.
opSettings.datafonosUnassignedHint: Unassigned: any waiter has to open Floor and pick the device manually.
opSettings.policiesIntro: Define how tips are split, how shifts are counted, and when the system considers a table at risk of leaving without paying.
opSettings.policiesTipsSharedSubtitle: Tips belong to the restaurant. The operator decides how to distribute them at closing. The waiter doesn't see personal tips in their 'Me' view.
opSettings.policiesTipsByWaiterSubtitle: Each tip is tied to the waiter who charged the bill. Everyone sees their daily total in 'Me'.
opSettings.policiesShiftsQuestion: Who opens and closes the shift?
opSettings.policiesShiftsGlobalSubtitle: One shift per restaurant, opened and closed by the operator. Cash reconciliation at the end of the day.
opSettings.policiesShiftsByWaiterSubtitle: Each waiter opens and closes their own shift from the app. Useful when long / short shifts rotate. Coexists with the venue shift.
opSettings.policiesWalkoutQuestion: When is a table at risk of leaving without paying?
opSettings.policiesWalkoutIntro: The Tables view colors each table by the time unpaid since you delivered all dishes (or since they requested the bill and nobody attended). Raise the number in long-lingering restaurants; lower it for fast turnover.
opSettings.policiesWalkoutFootnote: For bill requests or unattended waiter calls, the thresholds are halved (more urgent). A table still cooking is never at risk.
opSettings.policiesWalkoutRangeError: Walkout threshold must be between 1 and 180 minutes.
opSettings.usuariosIntro: Create and manage the waiters, kitchen, bar, card reader, and other operators of your restaurant.
opSettings.usuariosEmptyBody: Add your first waiter, kitchen, or card reader.
opSettings.usuariosDeleteSelfTitle: You can't delete your own user
opSettings.usuariosNewPasswordHint: Leave it blank to keep the current one
opSettings.usuariosRoleSelfHint: You can't change your own role
opSettings.usuariosConfirmDelete: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

opSalon.title: Floor plan
opSalon.intro: Lay out your dining room as it really is: place the tables, mark the entrance and paint zones (garden, terrace, indoor…). Guests will see this map when booking and can pick their table with context.
opSalon.noTablesPre: No tables yet. Create tables from
opSalon.saveError: We couldn't save. Please try again.
opSalon.hintPlaceTable: Tap a cell to place the table
opSalon.hintMoveZone: Tap the cell for the zone's top-left corner
opSalon.hintMoveMarker: Tap the cell where the icon goes
opSalon.hintAddZone: Drag across the cells to cover the "{label}" zone (or tap one)
opSalon.zoneEditHint: Tap cells to add or remove; drag to paint a block. The zone can be an irregular shape.
opSalon.unplacedHeading: Unplaced — drag onto the map, or tap one and then a cell
opSalon.zonesIconsHeading: Zones and icons — tap to edit
opSalon.tipPre: Tip: drag tables to arrange them (or tap, then a cell). The table shape (square / round / bar) is only visual. Capacity and minimum spend are edited in

opStations.title: Stations
opStations.intro: Set where each category goes when a guest sends an order. If a dish doesn't fit its category, you can override it from the menu editor.
opStations.barBodyPre: If someone is dedicated to the bar, the cocktails and drinks they prepare get their own board at
opStations.barBodyPost: . Otherwise, everything from the bar is treated as fridge pickup (the waiter grabs it).
opStations.subStationsBodyPre: Optional. If the bar has several stations (cocktails, coffee, beers), list them separated by commas. Each one gets its own tab at
opStations.subStationsBodyPost: and its own printer if you have printing on.
opStations.printBodyPre: Print a physical ticket when an order arrives. Open
opStations.printBodyMid2: ) on the computer connected to the thermal printer. The page prints automatically when an order arrives.
opStations.printKitchenHelp: Prints when moving from “To prepare” to “In kitchen”.
opStations.printBarHelp: Prints when moving from “To prepare” to “In preparation”. The dish countdown starts at the same time.
opStations.suggestionBody: We detected {count, plural, one {# drink category} other {# drink categories}} still going to the kitchen (
opStations.noCategories: No categories. Create them from the menu.
opStations.counterNote: the item comes in ready, without going through kitchen or bar. It shows up directly in the Floor with a tag for where to grab it. Ideal for water bottles and bottled beers.

opReservasCfg.title: Reservations
opReservasCfg.intro: Let your guests reserve a table from a link. Set the shifts when you take reservations, how long each one lasts, and whether they confirm automatically or you approve them.
opReservasCfg.saveError: We couldn't save. Please try again.
opReservasCfg.enableBody: Turn on so your guests can reserve a table from a public link.
opReservasCfg.shareHint: Share it on WhatsApp, social media or your website.
opReservasCfg.googleBody: Add your reservation link to your Google profile so people who find you on Maps can book directly. Use this special link — reservations that come in through it are tagged as “Google Maps” so you can measure how many it brings.
opReservasCfg.googleStep1Post: (the one that controls your Maps listing).
opReservasCfg.googleStep3Post: (or “Links”), paste the link above as your reservation system.
opReservasCfg.googleStep4Pre: If you don't see the Reservations option, paste it in the
opReservasCfg.googleStep4Post: field or as a featured link.
opReservasCfg.googleStep5: Save. Done — the “Reserve” button on Maps now points here.
opReservasCfg.googleNote: Note: native booking inside Google (without leaving Maps) requires being an approved “Reserve with Google” partner — a separate process. This link captures 90% of the value right away.
opReservasCfg.autoConfirmBody: If you turn it off, each reservation arrives as “pending” and you confirm it by hand.
opReservasCfg.policyPlaceholder: e.g. 15-minute grace period. Reservations for groups of 8+ by phone.
opReservasCfg.depositBodyPost: . Here you choose which online methods charge it when booking. It's credited to the bill when they arrive; if they don't show, it's not refunded. Cash and card terminal don't apply (the guest isn't on-site when booking).
opReservasCfg.depositNoMethodsPre: To charge deposits you need an active online payment method (Card, PSE or Apple Pay). Enable them in
opReservasCfg.depositNoneSelected: With no method checked you won't be able to charge deposits: tables with a deposit will be reserved without charging it.
opReservasCfg.shiftsBodyPre: Set the time ranges when you take reservations. Each shift is automatically split into reservations of

opIdentity.title: Business identity
opIdentity.intro: Logo, legal name, NIT and DIAN resolution. This information appears on the invoices you send customers and on the menu they see when scanning the QR.
opIdentity.groupIntro: This restaurant belongs to a group. You can use a shared legal entity (same DIAN numbering for the locations that share it) or leave it as "use the restaurant's own" and edit the local fields below.
opIdentity.groupEmptyPre: There are no legal entities in the group yet. Create one at
opIdentity.logoHelp: PNG or SVG. It appears on the customer menu and on the invoices we email. If empty we use the MESAPAY logo.
opIdentity.fieldNameHint: Appears as the sender of invoice emails. E.g. if you enter 'DELIRIO RESTAURANTE' the customer sees 'DELIRIO RESTAURANTE · MESAPAY' in their inbox.
opIdentity.fieldTaxIdHint: Digits only. The check digit is not required.
opIdentity.dianHelp: The resolution information shown on receipt-style invoices. We don't connect with the DIAN — this is only for printing on the receipt.
opIdentity.prefixHint: Appears before the sequence number. E.g. POS, FE.
opIdentity.nextNumberHint: If you were already issuing on another platform or want to start from the beginning of the resolution, adjust this number.

opPagos.title: Activate payments
opPagos.intro: Upload your documents, validate the bank account and submit the request to start collecting payments.
opPagos.statusActiveBody: Your account is active. Internal ID: {merchantId}
opPagos.statusReviewBody: We're validating your documents. We'll email you when it goes active.
opPagos.step1Subtitle: When you upload the RUT, we fill in the legal information automatically with AI.
opPagos.step2Subtitle: We read it with AI on upload to fill in the form automatically.
opPagos.aiReadPost: . If something is wrong, upload a clearer certification.
opPagos.step3Subtitle: Filled in automatically when you upload the bank certification.
opPagos.step4Subtitle: Filled in automatically when you upload the RUT.
opPagos.beneficiaryMatch: The account holder matches the RUT.
opPagos.beneficiaryMismatchTitle: The account holder does not match the RUT
opPagos.beneficiaryMismatchHelp: To avoid problems with fund disbursement, the account beneficiary must be the same as the RUT holder. Correct the data or upload the right documents.
opPagos.lockedNotice: The request has already been submitted. If you need to fix something, contact us.
opPagos.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Use PDF, JPG, PNG or WebP.
opPagos.tileDragOrClick: Drag the file or click to upload it
opPagos.tileHint: PDF, JPG, PNG or WebP · max 10 MB
opPagos.errBeneficiaryMismatch: The account holder ({bankId}) does not match the RUT ({rutId}). Correct the data before submitting.
opPagos.errSubmitFailedNoDetail: The request was rejected: no detail

opMenus.title: Menus
opMenus.intro: A menu groups categories. Most restaurants have just one (Main menu). Create another for wines, cocktails, brunch — and guests will see tabs to switch between them.
opMenus.moveCategoryHint: To move a category to another menu, open it from <link>Menu</link> and use the “Menu” selector in the category header.
opMenus.errAtLeastOne: There must be at least one menu.
opMenus.confirmDeleteWithCats: Delete "{label}"? Its {count, plural, one {# category} other {# categories}} will be moved to the first remaining menu.

opMenuEditor.title: Menu
opMenuEditor.emptyMultiMenu: This menu has no categories yet. Create one or move one from another menu.
opMenuEditor.emptySingleMenu: You don't have any categories yet. Create the first one — for example, “Starters”, “Mains”, “Desserts”.
opMenuEditor.availableTitle: Available — click to mark as sold out
opMenuEditor.mainCourseHelp: Enables “Mains together” mode when the diner chooses it while ordering — the kitchen holds these dishes until ALL of them are ready to go out to the table together.
opMenuEditor.mainCourseTitle: Enables ‘Mains together’ mode — the kitchen holds these dishes until ALL of them are ready to serve at the table together.
opMenuEditor.errCheckNamePrice: Check the name and the price.
opMenuEditor.errModifierIncomplete: The modifier "{label}" needs a label and at least one option.
opMenuEditor.confirmDeleteItem:
Delete "{name}"?

If it appears in past orders it can't be fully deleted — we'll keep it archived (it stops showing on the customer's menu).
opMenuEditor.stationHelp: Useful for cases like “fresh juice” in a category that generally goes to the bar but this specific one goes to the kitchen.
opMenuEditor.tagsEmpty: No tags configured yet. Create the first ones in <link>Settings → Tags</link>.
opMenuEditor.orphanTagTitle: Tag no longer exists in your configuration
opMenuEditor.archiveTitle: Stops showing on the customer's menu without deleting it
opMenuEditor.modifiersEmpty: No modifiers. For example: spice level, size, side.
